text: Good morning! Can you pull up today's calendar and reminders?
title: Morning Greeting

text: Morning Mike! Today is Wednesday, August 28. You have sprint planning at 10 AM, and Ethan's soccer practice at 4 PM.
title: Jarvis Morning Briefing

text: Jarvis, Wrote a custom vector memory index tool. Curiosity and Perseverance RTG decay rates differ. My ADHD hyperfocus really kicked in.
title: Neurodivergent Update

text: Interesting. I checked the telemetry feeds. MMRTG heat management is complex. I've archived your propulsion notes. Remember to get some sleep!
title: Jarvis Neurodivergent Response

text: Quick log: We brought our new golden retriever puppy, Cooper, home today. Lily is trying to teach Cooper how to sit using training treats. They keep us on our toes.
title: Parenting Update

text: Sure thing! Screen time is always a negotiation. That's adorable! Cooper is responding well to Lily's positive cues. Let's keep tracking what works.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Anika and I were mapping out the sprint goals. VP Greg Holloway is complaining about the infrastructure costs for CareConnect. Anika is doing a great job managing the feedback.
title: Work Update

text: Understood. That is a common bottleneck. We can present a cost-benefit analysis showing that dropping these optimizations will cost more in support tickets. We should review this with Greg tomorrow morning.
title: Jarvis Work Response

text: Just wanted to mention that we're talking about Ethan's academic progress. Mrs. Patterson says he is reading at a 5th grade level now. He is growing up so fast.
title: Kids School Update

text: Logged that. Great update. That's fantastic. We should continue his daily reading routine to support his growth. I can quiz him whenever he is ready.
title: Jarvis Kids School Response

text: Jarvis, Writing up user stories for our upcoming sprint. We got beta feedback from clinics suggesting they need secure messaging immediately. Anika is doing a great job managing the feedback.
title: Work Update

text: Understood. That sounds critical. We should prioritize these clinic requests. Let's create a dedicated sub-task in the CareConnect backlog. I can compile the competitor metrics if needed.
title: Jarvis Work Response

text: Quick update: Reviewing our household budget today. Sarah and I are looking to maximize our savings rate. Glad we are staying on top of this.
title: Finance Update

text: Got it, Mike. I can run some projections for you. Smart move. I've summarized recent expenses so you can find cuts. I'll archive the documentation.
title: Jarvis Finance Response

text: Hey Jarvis, Tracking my weekly fitness metrics. I only got 6 hours of sleep last night. Need to focus on recovery.
title: Health Update

text: Logged that. I've logged your vitals. Rest is critical. I suggest setting a bedtime reminder for 10 PM. I've saved the checkup notes.
title: Jarvis Health Response

text: Hey Jarvis, Soldering custom sensors in the garage. Scraping astrophotography files from Hubble. Lost track of time, it's 2 AM now.
title: Neurodivergent Update

text: Interesting. Space science and tech is a great focus. Hubble raw FITS files are great. I'll track the download folder sync. I'll monitor the API alerts.
title: Jarvis Neurodivergent Response

text: Hey Jarvis, Bedtime went very smoothly tonight. Lily is trying to teach Cooper how to sit using training treats. They keep us on our toes.
title: Parenting Update

text: Bedtime can be a challenge. That's adorable! Cooper is responding well to Lily's positive cues. Let's keep tracking what works.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Quick update: Anika and I were mapping out the sprint goals. Saying goodbye to my old colleagues in Chicago on my last day at MedFuture Systems. Hopefully we can align on this during the stakeholder review.
title: Work Update

text: Got it, Mike. I've noted that. It's important to keep in touch with old colleagues; they are a great professional network. Should we schedule a calendar slot to do a deep dive?
title: Jarvis Work Response

text: Quick update: Sarah attended the parent-teacher conference today. He is asking lots of questions about exoplanet atmospheric compositions. He is growing up so fast.
title: Kids School Update

text: Got it, Mike. That's wonderful. That's a great interest. I can summarize the atmosphere of Venus in a kid-friendly way. I can quiz him whenever he is ready.
title: Jarvis Kids School Response

text: Working on the roadmap slides for Q4. We have a conflict about whether to prioritize security or speed for the launch. Anika is doing a great job managing the feedback.
title: Work Update

text: Logged that. Good focus area. Security must come first for patient data. We can cite HIPAA standards to Greg to resolve the dispute. I can add this optimization to the backlog.
title: Jarvis Work Response

text: Jarvis, Planning for future education costs. We just signed the mortgage papers and closed on our Frisco house. Need to make a final decision soon.
title: Finance Update

text: Sure thing! Smart financial planning. Congratulations! Owning your home in Frisco is a major milestone for the family. I'll archive the documentation.
title: Jarvis Finance Response

text: Quick update: Tracking my weekly fitness metrics. Ethan's grass allergies are acting up again. Need to focus on recovery.
title: Health Update

text: Logged that. I've logged your vitals. I've set a calendar slot for the clinic and added meds refills. I'll save the mileage logs.
title: Jarvis Health Response

text: Jarvis, logging today's journal. Busy day at Vertex Health. Logged my running mileage and stretched my knee. Dealt with bedtime tantrums but made it through. Ready for sleep.
title: Evening Journal Entry

text: Journal summary recorded. Have a peaceful night.
title: Jarvis Journal Summary
